content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Qase: Developer Advocate Anywhere in the World Delaware Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/3015/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Delaware, USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://qase.io/">https://qase.io/</a> </p> <p><strong>About the role</strong></p> <p>Developers are shipping AI-generated code faster than anyone can review it. Quality is the new bottleneck and AI-generated-code governance is increasingly necessary. Qase is how engineering teams verify the quality of AI-generated code, so their companies can safely adopt AI-accelerated workflows. We're looking for someone with a technical background and love of software quality who wants to contribute to re-imagining how engineering orgs work given the massive implications of heavy adoption of AI-coding platforms and MCP-mediated access to other developer tools.</p> <p><strong>You might be a fit if you're…</strong></p> <p>A talented QA / quality engineer or quality-obsessed developer. From there, two paths fit this role:</p> <ul> <li><strong>A QA practitioner growing into advocacy:</strong>&nbsp;Maybe you've dabbled (a talk, a blog, an OSS contribution), maybe you haven't yet, but you genuinely&nbsp;<em>want</em>&nbsp;to do this: get on stage, work a booth, be in the testing/dev communities. We'll build the advocacy with you: mentorship, speaker coaching, and a staged ramp at real events. You're ready to do it full-time, with a product to influence and a company behind you.</li> <li><strong>Experienced developer advocate:</strong>&nbsp;Speaking at conferences, maintaining or contributing to OSS testing tools, running a newsletter or blog, or the person whose takes on testing and AI-generated code people actually repost,&nbsp;<em>and</em>&nbsp;with the QA credibility to back it. You arrive ready and ramp faster.</li> </ul> <p>You're credible because you've done the work, not because you read about it.</p> <p><strong>What you'll do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Be part of the communities we serve: online (the testing/dev Discords, Slacks, subreddits, LinkedIn), at meetups, and on conference stages. Showing up in these communities as a peer who happens to work at Qase and who sincerely wants to help their peers find ways to improve their workflow.</li> <li>Take a real point of view on software quality in the age of AI: how teams should test AI-generated code, verify intent, and keep token use under control. Start with thoughtful research, and from there create derivative content and genuinely-useful tools.</li> <li>Make the rest of the company credible. Coach sales and marketing on what lands and what gets an eye-roll. e.g. be the person a salesperson can grab before a call to understand the difference between a release manager and an SDET.</li> <li>Run the US field motion: practitioner meetups, prospect dinners and outings, conference presence, alongside reps and a supporting event coordinator.</li> <li>Close the loop to product. You'll understand what the community wants, and represent their needs to the rest of Qase.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What we're looking for</strong></p> <p>Required of every candidate:</p> <ul> <li><strong>QA / software development credibility.</strong>&nbsp;A testing or developer audience trusts you.</li> <li><strong>A genuine desire to evangelize.</strong>&nbsp;You&nbsp;<em>want</em>&nbsp;to be on stage and at the booth. Not tolerate it, want it. No desire to present is not a fit.</li> <li>A commercial instinct. You think about whether the work grows the business, not only whether it's interesting. Be entrepreneurial, and keep an eye out for opportunities to turn experimental projects into durable and scalable DevRel programs.</li> <li>Hands-on technical depth. You've written tests, broken builds, and used AI coding tools enough to have opinions about where they're great as well as what their limitations are.</li> <li>Comfort with ambiguity and porous boundaries. This is a series A startup, and the "how" will change often. We're looking to hire an adaptable problem solver, not someone who needs a fixed playbook.</li> <li>Generally, we want someone that has strong judgement, builds leverage for themselves, and has strong communication and relationship building skills.</li> </ul> <p>A plus, the "ready advocate":</p> <ul> <li><strong>Existing developer-advocacy standing.</strong>&nbsp;You can point to where you've built it (talks, writing, OSS, community presence), and you're already in the communities we want to influence, or close enough to walk in tomorrow and not look like an asshole. You'll ramp faster and start owning events sooner.</li> </ul> <p><strong>How you'll ramp</strong></p> <p>How quickly you start owning events depends on where you begin:</p> <ul> <li>If you're growing into advocacy, you'll ramp at real events: shadow our existing conference presence, get coaching (ours and a dedicated speaker coach), start with lower-stakes meetup talks, and grow into owning US conferences. You'll be in front of a friendly room before a big stage.</li> <li>If you arrive ready, the ramp compresses: get up to speed on the product and our point of view, then take events sooner.</li> </ul> <p>This is a North America-based role, requires regular travel, clustered around conference season, and ideally you are located near a major tech hub / airport.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/qase-developer-advocate">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/qase-developer-advocate</a></p> Fri, 10 Jul 2026 19:44:50 +0000 Sun, 09 Aug 2026 19:44:50 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/qase-developer-advocate https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/qase-developer-advocate APEX TRADE: Entry-Level Crypto Market Specialist Anywhere in the World Aberdeen, City of Cryptocurrency All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5778/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> </p> <div class="vacancy-intro reveal reveal-delay-2 is-visible"> <p>Application link: <a href="https://apexcgroup.com/work/weworkremotely">https://apexcgroup.com/work/weworkremotely</a></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>APEX TRADE is an international company working with digital assets, market research, and data-driven trading solutions. We are building a team of specialists who want to understand how crypto markets operate in practice and develop professional skills in a real market environment.</p> <p>We are opening an&nbsp;<strong>Entry-Level Crypto Market Specialist</strong> position for candidates who are starting their career in the crypto space and are interested in analytics, market behavior, and structured decision-making. No prior professional experience is required — training and guidance are provided.</p> </div> <div class="vacan
